one_time_description: Flood claim settlements received from federal ($58,799,614) and provincial ($19,253,071) governments, net transferred to Northwest Angle #33 Trust ($78,052,685), resulting in nil net impact on annual surplus from these items
economic_notes: Minority partnership interest in Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership and Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth GP. Investment in Nour Private Wealth Portfolio. Flood claim settlements from federal and provincial governments totalling approximately $78M transferred to Northwest Angle #33 Trust.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to non-identification of Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities under PS 3280. Large one-time flood claim settlements of $58,799,614 (federal) and $19,253,071 (provincial) were received and transferred to Northwest Angle #33 Trust ($78,052,685), netting to zero impact on surplus from these items. Consolidated entity includes CMHC Housing. Marketable securities (Nour Private Wealth Portfolio) of $3,279,798 newly added in 2024. Multiple ISC flood-claim promissory notes repaid during year from settlement proceeds. Province is Ontario despite the financial statement text.
